title: Example 6-8 endurance limit and fatigue strength for a machined 1015 HR steel bar in reversed axial loading

notes: This file follows Example 6-8 on p306.
ASTM minimum properties are fetched from Table A-20 using SAE/AISI 1015 and processing HR.
The service-temperature tensile-strength ratio is fetched from Table 6-4 and used first to modify Sut before estimating S'e with Eq. (6-8).
The Marin factors are then applied using Eqs. (6-18), (6-19), (6-21), and (6-26), with reliability factor from Table 6-5.
For Sut below 70 kpsi at service temperature, the solver uses the conservative text rule f = 0.9 from p293 for the finite-life line.
